name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Gohan Beast 15 cm | Dragon ball
description: From Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero, SON GOHAN BEAST joins S.H.Figuarts! It perfectly captures his voluminous hairstyle and shredded clothing. Optional expression parts let you re-create his defiant attitude against Cell Max, and numerous optional hands let you pose him either gathering ki or releasing powerful beam-cannon attacks against his foes. It even includes special effect parts for the beam attack, letting you re-live all the onscreen excitement! As a bonus, an optional face for the S.H.Figuarts Ultimate GOHAN SUPER HERO figure (sold separately) is included, letting you re-create the moments before SON GOHAN goes beast mode! Set Contents Main Body, Three optional expressions, Three left and four right optional hands, Beam attack effect part set, Crossed arm parts BONUS S.H.Figuarts Ultimate GOHAN SUPER HERO optional expression
